name: model rationale detector accepts a registry-level rationale fallback when per-prompt is absent
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'rationale_default: cost-quality fallback for unspecified prompts
entries:
  - {name: a, model: sonnet}
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'fallback_rationale_used=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
